scenarios.description: Recovers from transient K8s API failures with retries.
scenarios.final_response: Transient API failures resolved after retries because connection recovered. Incident diagnosed and mitigation steps provided.

scenarios.description: Handles missing fields and partial payloads gracefully.
scenarios.final_response: Some metrics fields were unavailable because backend returned partial payloads. Provided conservative analysis and next verification steps.

scenarios.description: Timeout path returns incomplete run and should fail reliability gate.
scenarios.final_response: Query timed out and no further diagnostics were completed.

scenarios.description: Critical finding triggers proactive read-only investigation and root-cause summary.
scenarios.final_response: Critical crashloop finding was investigated and root cause identified as missing ConfigMap key. Suggested fix provided with confidence.

scenarios.description: Investigation timeout is reported cleanly and does not break monitor loop.
scenarios.final_response: Investigation timed out, failure event was emitted, and monitor continued scanning subsequent findings.

scenarios.description: Completed action is verified on the next scan and status is attached to history.
scenarios.final_response: Auto-fix completed and next-scan verification marked action as verified with evidence attached in history.
